name: Bhcu
description_short: Propell Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution designed specifically for small business owners, offering business loans, deposit accounts, and personalized banking services with NCUA insurance coverage up to $500,000.
description_long:
Propell Credit Union operates as a credit union that began as a neighborhood financial institution for personal banking and has evolved to specialize in serving small business owners. The credit union positions itself as 'the only credit union designed for small businesses,' addressing the unique challenges small business owners face through specialized financing and banking programs.

Propell offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including business loans (SBA and USDA), business real estate secured lines of credit, personal banking services, high-yield savings accounts (iSAVE up to 3.25% APY), home equity lines of credit with introductory rates of 4.99% APR, mortgage refinancing options, credit cards with rates as low as 11.49% APR, and tax filing services at $39. They also provide business services such as merchant services, payroll processing, retirement planning, workers compensation, and group health insurance.

What distinguishes Propell is its dual focus on both small business and personal banking, combined with its enhanced deposit insurance coverage. Beyond the standard NCUA insurance of $250,000, Propell provides additional Excess Share Insurance coverage of $250,000, enabling members to have up to $500,000 in total deposit insurance coverage. The organization emphasizes personalized member support and positions banking as a partnership rather than a transaction, with a CEO Corner for direct member communication.

Propell is appropriate for small business owners seeking specialized credit union banking with business-focused lending products and competitive rates. The institution maintains community involvement through programs like the Propell Kids Foundation and community events. However, potential members should note that specific eligibility criteria for membership and detailed rate comparisons with competitors are not fully transparent on the website.
services: Business loans including SBA and USDA loans
Business real estate secured lines of credit
iSAVE high-yield savings accounts up to 3.25% APY
Home equity lines of credit with 4.99% introductory APR
SmartRefi fixed-rate home equity loans (15 or 25-year options)
Credit cards with 11.49% APR and cash back rewards
Mobile and online banking via PropellGO app
pros: Enhanced deposit insurance coverage up to $500,000 through NCUA plus Excess Share Insurance, exceeding standard $250,000 NCUA limit
iSAVE high-yield savings accounts offering up to 3.25% APY with no fees and no fixed terms
Specialized small business lending products including SBA and USDA loans designed specifically for business owners
Comprehensive business services suite including merchant services, payroll processing, retirement planning, and workers compensation
Credit card with no balance transfer fees, no annual fees, and monthly cash back rewards
Home equity line of credit with introductory rate of 4.99% APR then WSJ Prime -1%
Mobile and online banking through PropellGO app for remote account management
cons: Website does not clearly specify membership eligibility requirements or location/geographic restrictions for enrollment
Limited transparency on specific small business loan rates, terms, and minimum/maximum loan amounts beyond general categories
Credit card APR of 11.49% is higher than many competitors offering cards in the 8-10% range
No information provided about account opening requirements, minimum balances, or monthly maintenance fees for various accounts
Website lacks details on SBA loan approval rates, processing times, or specific application requirements
best_for: Small business owners seeking specialized credit union financing and banking services with business-focused loan products
Consumers wanting high-yield savings accounts without fees or fixed terms paired with enhanced deposit insurance protection
Business owners needing comprehensive financial services including payroll, merchant services, and workers compensation in addition to lending
Individuals and families in Propell's service area prioritizing personalized member support and community-focused banking
diagnosis: Propell Credit Union is best for small business owners and entrepreneurs seeking specialized credit union banking with business-focused lending products, competitive rates, and enhanced deposit insurance coverage. The main caveat is that membership eligibility requirements and geographic service areas are not transparently detailed on the website, requiring prospective members to contact the institution directly to confirm access.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Bhcu — Credit Union in RIDLEY PARK, PA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Bhcu — NCUA-insured credit union in RIDLEY PARK, PA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
